_about: content_v3 = content_v2 (scoring numbers, tara content, area_lines, narrative — all carried over unchanged) + the multi-variable score-detail layer: per-area band labels (band_labels, 6 areas x 5 bands, no label shared), and the two-sentence 'why today' composed as RECOGNITION (why_recognition: area x band x moon_group — names what the person may be feeling in that domain) + CAUSE (why_cause: area x day-lord weekday x paksha — one plain-language sky-based reason, band-neutral so any pairing reads coherently). moon_groups maps the day's Moon nakshatra (0-26) to a texture (deva=gentle, manushya=steady, rakshasa=sharp). Key scheme + guarantees: docs/CONTENT_KEYS.md; per-area voice rules: docs/voice/*.md; enforced by tests/test_content_diversity.py in CI. Actions live in the app's tip chips and are never repeated in why-copy. Subject to astrologer review.

opportunity: Quiet effort pays today — give {area} some unhurried attention.
Today rewards tending your own garden — {area} grows with gentle care.
warning: Don't overspend your energy — {area} can wait for a stronger day.
Keep {area} light today; you don't have to solve it now.
1.opportunity_detail: Today circles back to you — rest, reflection and honest planning count as real progress. What you steady now quietly supports everything later this week.
1.warning_detail: Energy is precious on a day like this. Choose the few things that matter, do them gently, and let the rest wait without guilt.
1.why: Today's Moon is in {day_nakshatra} — {tara_name} in your nine-day cycle from your birth star {natal}. That makes this a personal, inward-facing day.

opportunity: Luck leans your way — a well-timed move in {area} can pay off today.
Doors open easily today, especially around {area}. Knock.
warning: Good days invite carelessness — stay sharp on {area}.
Don't let the day's shine rush you into {area} decisions.
2.opportunity_detail: This is one of the friendlier days in your cycle — timing works with you. If you've been waiting to act on something well-prepared, today lowers the resistance.
2.warning_detail: The only trap on a lucky day is autopilot. Enjoy the tailwind, but keep your usual checks — read before you sign, count before you pay.
2.why: Today's Moon is in {day_nakshatra} — {tara_name} in your nine-day cycle from your birth star {natal}. Traditionally the luckiest beat of the cycle.

opportunity: Careful, small steps still move {area} forward today.
Even on a scratchy day, {area} responds to patience.
warning: Go slow around {area} today — double-check, then check again.
Friction gathers around {area} today; step around it, not into it.
3.opportunity_detail: Slow is smooth today. Careful, ordinary work — checking, backing up, tidying — quietly protects you from the day's friction.
3.warning_detail: Rushed moves are where today bites. Give everything one extra look, keep conversations light, and let big calls wait a day.
3.why: Today's Moon is in {day_nakshatra} — {tara_name} in your nine-day cycle from your birth star {natal}. A friction beat — which is why today asks for extra care.

opportunity: Steady hands win today — {area} strengthens with every small, reliable step.
Nurture {area} today; consistency is quietly compounding.
warning: Comfort can drift into autopilot — give {area} one deliberate touch today.
4.opportunity_detail: Today favours the steady builder. Routines, relationships and health respond warmly to small, consistent care right now.
4.warning_detail: The comfortable path is the right one today — just don't fall asleep on it. One deliberate act keeps a good day from drifting past unused.
4.why: Today's Moon is in {day_nakshatra} — {tara_name} in your nine-day cycle from your birth star {natal}. A steady, protective beat of the cycle.

opportunity: Clearing old clutter frees {area} to breathe — finish, then rest.
Tie up loose ends and {area} opens up on its own.
warning: Starting fresh in {area} today invites friction — finish first.
Push {area} to tomorrow; today is for closing, not opening.
5.opportunity_detail: Think of today as clearing the runway. Every loop you close — a task, a due, an apology — hands tomorrow to you lighter and freer.
5.warning_detail: New starts meet resistance today. It's not a wall, just a headwind — anything that can begin tomorrow will begin better tomorrow.
5.why: Today's Moon is in {day_nakshatra} — {tara_name} in your nine-day cycle from your birth star {natal}. A clearing beat — better for finishing than starting.

opportunity: Focused effort moves mountains today — point it at {area}.
You can finish what matters today; {area} responds fastest.
warning: Don't spread yourself thin — {area} needs your focus least today.
One strong push beats five scattered ones; let {area} sit.
6.opportunity_detail: Effort converts unusually well today. The focused hour you give your most important task will punch far above its weight.
6.warning_detail: Scattering is the one way to waste today. Pick the thing that matters most and give it your best hours first.
6.why: Today's Moon is in {day_nakshatra} — {tara_name} in your nine-day cycle from your birth star {natal}. The achievement beat — effort converts well.

opportunity: Protecting your energy is the win today — {area} stays safe when you go slow.
A quiet day guarded well sets {area} up for a stronger tomorrow.
warning: Shield {area} today — no risks, no big calls, no fine print.
Today is for defence, not offence — especially in {area}.
7.opportunity_detail: Today is a rest note in your rhythm — protecting your energy, sleep and peace is the productive choice.
7.warning_detail: Keep the stakes low today. Postpone signings, big spends and heavy talks — not out of fear, simply because better days are close.
7.why: Today's Moon is in {day_nakshatra} — {tara_name} in your nine-day cycle from your birth star {natal}. The most delicate beat — hence today's gentle advice.

opportunity: The right person can change your day — reach out about {area}.
Help arrives when asked for — {area} improves through people today.
warning: Don't carry {area} alone today — going solo is the trap.
Isolation makes {area} heavier; borrow a hand.
8.opportunity_detail: People are your luck today. Conversations, introductions and asked-for favours all run smoother than usual — use that.
8.warning_detail: Struggling alone is the only real mistake available today. The problem shrinks the moment you let someone look at it with you.
8.why: Today's Moon is in {day_nakshatra} — {tara_name} in your nine-day cycle from your birth star {natal}. A friendly beat — people and support flow easier.

opportunity: This is a green-light day — {area} is ready for your boldest move.
Momentum is with you; a leap in {area} lands well today.
warning: Momentum fades if unused — don't leave {area} for someday.
The only risk today is hesitation — {area} won't wait forever.
9.opportunity_detail: This is the strongest kind of day in your cycle. Well-prepared moves — asks, launches, commitments — land with unusual grace now.
9.warning_detail: Days like this are rare — don't spend one entirely on routine. Move one meaningful thing forward, even a single step.
9.why: Today's Moon is in {day_nakshatra} — {tara_name} in your nine-day cycle from your birth star {natal}. The strongest beat of the cycle — a natural green light.

1: You'll feel things more deeply today — tell someone what they mean to you instead of keeping it in.
A quiet day beats a grand gesture. Cook together, walk together, just be around your people.
If an old conversation resurfaces today, listen first — you'll actually hear what's underneath.
2: Hearts are open today — plan the date, make the call, say the thing.
A great day to celebrate someone — a small surprise will land bigger than you expect.
If you've been waiting for the right moment to talk about the future, this is it.
3: Small remarks can land wrong today — pause before replying, especially over text.
Not the day for the big relationship talk. Keep it light and revisit tomorrow.
If someone snaps at you today, it's probably not about you. Don't pick up the rope.
4: A steady, warm day for your people — call your parents, check in on an old friend.
Comfort is the romance today — the shared meal, the familiar show, the unhurried talk.
Someone close could use your steadiness today. Just showing up is the gesture.
5: Clear the air today — the small unresolved thing, not the big dramatic one.
Finish the apology, return the call you owe — closure is today's love language.
Give people a little room today; space now saves a misunderstanding later.
6: Show love by following through today — do the thing you promised, without being reminded.
Plan something to look forward to together — today is good at turning talk into dates.
One focused hour of real attention today beats a week of distracted presence.
7: Be extra gentle today — with them and with yourself. Skip the heavy topics.
Today is for quiet company, not big conversations. Sit close, keep it soft.
If you feel distant today, don't read meaning into it — some days just sit quieter.
8: Connection comes easily today — plan the evening with the people who refill you.
Introduce the people you love to each other today — mixed company brings out your best.
Say the appreciation out loud today; it will land deeper than you expect.
9: One of your best days for the heart — make the move you've been rehearsing.
Commit to something together today — the trip, the plan, the next step.
Today can hold the big conversation — honest words land softly on a day like this.

1: Park the big spends for now — today is for checking where your money actually went this month.
Skip the checkout button today. Make the wishlist, sleep on it, and see what still matters tomorrow.
A good day to quietly tidy your accounts — cancel the one subscription you never use.
2: A strong day for money moves you've already thought through — negotiate, or finally buy the thing you researched.
Ask for the better price today — deals tilt your way.
Good day to start the savings plan you keep postponing. Begin, even small.
3: Read the fine print twice today — and if a deal feels rushed, let it pass.
Hold off on big purchases today, and double-check account numbers on anything you must send.
Today's 'limited offer' will still be there next week. Wait.
4: A good day for the sensible money stuff — pay the bill, renew the policy, top up the emergency fund.
Steady beats spectacular today — automate one saving so future-you gets paid first.
Sort the money paperwork you've been avoiding — today has the patience for it.
5: Chase what you're owed today — the refund, the invoice, the borrowed amount.
Close the loop: settle the split bill, clear the small dues, cancel what you don't use.
Not a day to start new money commitments — finish the old ones first.
6: A strong day to work the plan — move the money you said you'd move, track what you said you'd track.
Negotiate today — you have the patience to hold your number.
Do the boring money task that unlocks the exciting one — the form, the KYC, the transfer.
7: Keep your wallet closed today — no big buys, no lending, no 'guaranteed' schemes.
If a money decision can wait two days, let it wait. Today isn't the day to sign.
Be extra careful with OTPs, links and 'urgent' payment requests today.
8: Talk money with someone you trust today — a second opinion saves you real rupees.
A good day for shared plans — split costs, pool ideas, plan the group trip budget.
The referral, the contact, the friend-of-a-friend — today your network is worth more than your wallet.
9: A rare green-light day — act on the money decision you've done your homework on.
Big-ticket clarity is here today — if you've compared and slept on it, go ahead.
Set the bigger financial goal today and take its first concrete step before bed.

1: Work on your own craft today — clear your backlog, polish that draft, skip the big pitch.
Keep your head down and finish what's already on your desk. Visibility can wait a day.
Today favours planning over performing — map out your next move instead of announcing it.
2: Good day to ask for what you deserve at work — schedule that conversation before evening.
Pitch the idea today. Doors that are usually shut open a crack on days like this.
Apply, email, follow up — today your name lands on the right desks.
3: Triple-check before you hit send today — attachments, numbers, names.
Keep your head low in meetings today; observe more than you argue.
If a work conflict sparks today, respond tomorrow. Calm wins this one.
4: Consistency gets noticed today — deliver the routine thing exceptionally well.
Strengthen the foundations: update the tracker, thank the teammate, tidy the inbox.
A good day for one-on-ones and honest check-ins — trust builds easily today.
5: Finish before you start today — the half-done task is worth more than the new idea.
Clear your pending list today; tomorrow's opportunities need a clean desk.
Postpone the launch, the pitch, the announcement — polish today, ship on a better day.
6: Deep work wins today — block two hours, close the tabs, finish the thing that matters.
Today rewards the finisher. Ship it at ninety percent instead of polishing forever.
Set the ambitious deadline today — you're in the mood to meet it.
7: Do solid, quiet work today — avoid confrontations and keep big asks for later this week.
Not the day to send the angry email or the risky reply-all. Draft it, don't send it.
Protect your reputation today: under-promise, double-check, stay out of office politics.
8: Ask for help today — the person you're hesitant to message will actually be glad you did.
Collaborate over competing today: co-write, pair up, share credit generously.
Coffee with a colleague beats an hour of solo grinding today — the shortcut is a conversation.
9: Swing big today — the promotion ask, the client pitch, the bold application.
Start the thing today — projects begun on days like this tend to go the distance.
Say yes to the stretch assignment today. You'll grow into it faster than you think.

1: Your mind wants quiet today. One task at a time, phone face down.
Journal for five minutes tonight — today's thoughts are worth keeping.
Step away from the noise this afternoon; your best thinking happens off-screen today.
2: Ideas come easily today — write them down before the day gets busy.
Say yes to the new thing today; your mind is sharp enough to catch up fast.
A great day to learn in public — ask the question everyone else is afraid to ask.
3: Your focus may scatter today — shrink the to-do list to three things and forgive the rest.
Don't make big decisions in a foggy moment. Note it down, decide tomorrow.
Today rewards slow reading and slow answers. Speed is where the mistakes are.
4: Your thinking is clear and calm today — use it on the decision you've been circling.
Read something slow and good tonight instead of scrolling something fast and empty.
Today is good for sorting, not sprinting — organise your notes and your week.
5: Unfinished tasks are renting space in your head — evict two of them today.
Say no to one thing today. The relief will tell you it was right.
Today thinks best backwards — review what worked this week before planning the next.
6: Your concentration is a superpower today — spend it on the hardest problem first.
Whatever you're studying will actually stick today — do the next chapter.
Write the difficult email in one sitting today. It's clearer now than it will be tomorrow.
7: Your mind may run worst-case stories today. Notice them, don't believe them.
Lower the volume today — less news, fewer feeds, more of whatever settles you.
Don't judge your life from inside a tired day. Decide nothing big tonight.
8: Think out loud today — your best ideas need another person to bounce off.
Ask someone how they'd solve your problem today. The outside view is the unlock.
Teach what you know to someone today — you'll understand it twice as well.
9: Clarity is at full strength today — make the decision you've been circling for weeks.
Commit to learning the big skill today — sign up, schedule it, tell someone.
Trust your judgment today; the overthinking can take the day off.

1: Listen to your body today — stretch, rest, and don't push through tiredness.
Go gentle: a slow walk and an early night will do more than a hard workout.
Cook something simple at home tonight — your body will thank you for it.
2: Energy is on your side — book the class, take the longer route, start the streak.
Today's a good day to begin a health habit you'll actually keep. Start small and count it.
Cook the ambitious recipe, take the longer walk — your body is up for more today.
3: Watch the small stuff today — the skipped meal, the rushed stairs, the fourth coffee.
Ease off risky workouts today; your body wants maintenance, not max effort.
Sleep is your repair kit tonight — protect it.
4: Routine is medicine today — the usual walk, proper meals, water before chai.
Book the checkup you keep postponing. Today's the day health admin gets done.
An early, unhurried night tonight will carry you through the whole week.
5: Recovery is the workout today — stretch what's tight, rest what's sore.
Break one small unhealthy loop today — the late-night scroll, the skipped breakfast.
Your energy is for maintenance today, not personal records.
6: Push day — add the extra set, the extra kilometre. Your discipline shows up today.
Prep your meals for the next two days — today's willpower can feed the week.
Turn the goal into a number today — steps, minutes, reps — and beat it.
7: Rest is productive today — take it before your body insists on it.
Skip the heavy lifting today, literally. Stretch, walk slowly, sleep early.
Eat warm, simple food and drink more water than you think you need today.
8: Health is social today — walk with a friend, cook with family, join the group class.
Make the health plan with a buddy today; you'll both actually stick to it.
An evening walk-and-talk today counts double — movement and connection in one.
9: A strong day to commit — join the gym, book the trek, sign up for the run.
Set the health goal that scares you a little today, and take its first step immediately.
Your body and willpower agree today — the habit you start now has staying power.

1: Feelings run close to the surface today. Be as kind to yourself as you'd be to a friend.
Don't over-plan today — leave room for one thing that's just for you.
If the day feels heavy, name it to someone you trust. It gets lighter when it's shared.
2: Today has a bright edge — share it. Your good mood is contagious.
Let yourself enjoy today without waiting for the catch. There isn't one.
Do one thing today purely because it delights you.
3: An irritable current runs through today — step outside before it builds up.
Don't measure your life on a wobbly day. Today is weather, not climate.
Keep your evening simple tonight — fewer plans, softer landing.
4: A grounded, quietly good day — notice it while it's happening.
Gratitude lands easily today — tell one person what they've made easier for you.
Keep today's pace; not every day needs to be a big one.
5: If today drags, let it — some days are for emptying the bag, not filling it.
Tidy one corner — a drawer, a desktop, a doubt. Outer order helps today.
Don't force cheerfulness today; steady and honest is enough.
6: Progress is today's mood-lifter — finish one real thing before lunch and ride that feeling.
Channel restlessness into one meaningful push today; drift is the only thing that will sour it.
Tonight, look at what you finished — not what's left. You earned that.
7: A fragile-feeling day — shrink your circle to people who ask nothing of you.
Comfort is allowed today: the familiar food, the old songs, the early night.
Today asks for less. Doing the minimum on a day like this is a kind of wisdom.
8: People are the cure today — one honest conversation will lift the whole day.
Reach out first today. Everyone's waiting for someone to go first, and it may as well be you.
Accept help gracefully today — letting someone in is a gift to them too.
9: Today feels like a tailwind — do the thing you'd do if you weren't afraid.
Save some of today's brightness — note down what's working so you can reread it on a duller day.
Ride today's momentum somewhere generous — your confidence can carry someone else too.

radiant: Today carries real momentum — the kind of day when things you start actually move.
The day opens with a tailwind; you'll feel it in how easily things line up.
bright: A warm, capable day — most things you touch should cooperate.
Today runs smoother than average; a little intention will take it far.
steady: A balanced, workable day — nothing dramatic, plenty possible.
Today holds steady; it will follow the pace you set for it.
quiet: A slower day — better for tending than pushing.
Today asks for patience more than effort; work with it, not against it.
tender: A soft, careful day — keep it simple and be kind to yourself.
Today runs low and quiet; protect your energy and let the small stuff slide.

closers: Your brightest window is around {best}, so lean there — and go easy on {caution}.
Put your best hours into {best}; {caution} will feel better with a lighter touch.
Give {best} the prime of your day and ask little of {caution}.

peak.gentle: If a money decision has been waiting for a clear-headed day, this is the one it was waiting for.
peak.sharp: You can feel the difference today — numbers add up faster, and the money call you have been circling looks suddenly simple.
peak.steady: The money picture sits still long enough to act on — what you decide now, you will not need to re-decide.

high.gentle: Money moves your way today, quietly — a good stretch for the purchase or the ask you have already thought through.
high.sharp: There is momentum behind money today; a negotiation or a follow-up on pending payments will meet less resistance than usual.
high.steady: A dependable day for money — not a windfall kind of day, but the kind where sensible steps compound.

mid.gentle: Money is neither pushing nor pulling today — routine payments and small calls are safe, and the big swing can wait.
mid.sharp: The money mood is transactional today — fine for errands and bills, less kind to leaps of faith.
mid.steady: An even day for money: nothing urgent, nothing blocked — a good time to simply know your numbers.

low.gentle: Money asks for a slower hand today — nothing is going wrong, the day just favours checking over committing.
low.sharp: If a purchase feels urgent today, that urgency is the thing to distrust — prices and promises read better tomorrow.
low.steady: Hold your money where it is today — the deals are not disappearing, and a paused decision is still a decision.

deep.gentle: Keep your wallet quiet today — this is a day for guarding what you have, not growing it.
deep.sharp: Spending can feel like relief today — notice that pull, and let the card stay in the pocket.
deep.steady: Sit out the money game today — review what went out this month and let that be the whole job.

peak.gentle: Hearts are unusually easy to reach today — the words you have been saving will land the way you meant them.
peak.sharp: There is a charge in your connections today — the honest conversation you have been postponing has a real opening.
peak.steady: Today holds space for the people who matter — presence will do more than any plan.

high.gentle: Warmth comes easily today — a small gesture will carry further than you expect.
high.sharp: People respond quickly to you today — reach out first and watch the difference.
high.steady: A good day to tend a relationship the unglamorous way — time, attention, and one kept promise.

mid.gentle: Connections run normal today — no fireworks needed, just do not let the day pass without one real exchange.
mid.sharp: Conversations may run a little brisk today — slow yours down and the tone around you softens.
mid.steady: An ordinary day for love, which is its own gift — share a meal, share the small news.

low.gentle: Hearts bruise a little easier today — go softly with the people you love, and softer still with yourself.
low.sharp: Small remarks can land bigger than intended today — give people one extra beat of patience before replying.
low.steady: Closeness may feel a step away today — do not chase it with words; sit nearby and let it return.

deep.gentle: Be extra gentle in your relationships today — hold the heavy topics for a kinder-weather day.
deep.sharp: Friction finds conversations quickly today — the kindest sentence available might be 'let us talk tomorrow'.
deep.steady: If someone feels distant today, it is not a verdict — some days simply sit quieter between people.

peak.gentle: Doors at work open with unusual ease today — the idea you have been sitting on deserves daylight.
peak.sharp: Your work gets noticed today — put your name on the thing you are proud of and let it travel.
peak.steady: Effort converts cleanly today — hours spent on the important task will show, not just add up.

high.gentle: Work flows your way today — a good window to volunteer for the visible piece.
high.sharp: Timing favours the bold move at work today — the pitch, the application, the raised hand.
high.steady: A productive stretch — pick the one deliverable that matters and give it your best hours.

mid.gentle: Work runs at normal speed today — reliable beats brilliant, and showing up counts double.
mid.sharp: Today rewards the unglamorous tasks — clear the backlog and tomorrow's bigger move gets easier.
mid.steady: A plain, honest workday — steady output, no theatrics, real progress.

low.gentle: Work may feel like wading today — shorten the to-do list and call the day won at three items.
low.sharp: Pushback comes easier than praise today — keep your head down and your drafts private a little longer.
low.steady: Momentum rests today — use the lull to tidy the desk, the inbox, the plan.

deep.gentle: Lie low at work today — protect your energy and let the ambitious moves wait for a louder day.
deep.sharp: This is not the day to force the career question — visibility works against you when the air is this charged.
deep.steady: Step back from the push today — regrouping is also a strategy, and today it is the right one.

peak.gentle: Your body feels cooperative today — a longer walk or a fuller practice will feel like a gift, not a task.
peak.sharp: Energy runs high in the body today — burn it on movement you enjoy before it turns into restlessness.
peak.steady: Strength is quietly available today — the routine you have been meaning to restart will stick better if it starts now.

high.gentle: The body hums along today — feed it well and it will carry you happily.
high.sharp: Good physical charge today — a brisk session will clear more than muscles.
high.steady: A solid day in the body — keep the basics honest: water, meals on time, a real break.

mid.gentle: The body is neutral today — it will follow whatever rhythm you set, so set a kind one.
mid.sharp: Energy arrives in bursts today — work with the surges and do not fight the dips.
mid.steady: An average-energy day — stretch what is stiff, walk after lunch, nothing heroic required.

low.gentle: The body asks for an easier day — take the gentler option each time one is offered.
low.sharp: Tiredness can masquerade as irritation today — before reacting, check when you last ate or rested.
low.steady: Run at three-quarter speed today — the workout can shrink, the sleep should not.

deep.gentle: Rest is the productive choice today — give the body the early evening it has been asking for.
deep.sharp: The tank reads low today — skip the push, keep meals warm and simple, and turn in early.
deep.steady: Today is for recovery, not performance — the training resumes stronger for the pause.

peak.gentle: The mind is unusually clear today — the tangled problem will untangle if you give it one quiet hour.
peak.sharp: Thinking runs fast and clean today — write while it flows; these notes will feed weeks of work.
peak.steady: Deep focus is available today — guard one block of it fiercely and spend it on what matters most.

high.gentle: Thoughts line up nicely today — a fine day for planning, studying, or finally answering properly.
high.sharp: The mind is quick today — aim it before it aims itself.
high.steady: Concentration holds well today — batch the thinking work and let the shallow tasks queue.

mid.gentle: Focus is workable in short stretches today — twenty good minutes beats two distracted hours.
mid.sharp: Attention flickers today — close the extra tabs, in the browser and in the head.
mid.steady: A middling day for focus — pair the hard thinking with your best hour and coast the rest.

low.gentle: The mind scatters easily today — one thing at a time is not a productivity tip, it is the day's rule.
low.sharp: Thoughts run loud but not straight today — decisions can wait, notes cannot; write things down.
low.steady: Focus drifts today — anchor it with lists and small finishes rather than willpower.

deep.gentle: The mind wants soft focus today — let it wander on a walk instead of forcing it to a desk.
deep.sharp: Mental static sits high today — postpone the fine print and the final answers.
deep.steady: Thinking runs slow today — respect that: read, absorb, and let conclusions arrive tomorrow.

peak.gentle: The heart sits light today — notice it out loud; naming a good day doubles it.
peak.sharp: Spirits run high and bright today — spend the shine on something you will remember.
peak.steady: Contentment comes easily today — no need to improve the day, just do not miss it.

high.gentle: The mood is warm today — a good day to be generous with your good humour.
high.sharp: There is a lift in you today — ride it into the thing you have been dreading; it will feel smaller.
high.steady: Emotionally even and quietly upbeat — the kind of day that makes no headlines and leaves no bruises.

mid.gentle: Feelings run flat-normal today — that is not a problem to fix, just a day to live.
mid.sharp: The mood swings on small hinges today — choose your inputs: music, company, and news all count.
mid.steady: An even-keeled day inside — let it be plain; plain is restful.

low.gentle: The mood runs muted today — lower the bar, keep the self-talk kind, and let small comforts count.
low.sharp: Irritation sits close to the surface today — name it as weather, not truth, and it passes quicker.
low.steady: Feelings sit low-key today — do not audit your life from this seat; the view improves in a day or two.

deep.gentle: The heart feels heavy today — carry less, cancel one thing, and be as kind to yourself as you would be to a friend.
deep.sharp: Everything can feel personal today — it mostly is not; give the big feelings room without handing them the wheel.
deep.steady: A heavy-weather day inside — it says nothing about your life, only about today; warmth and patience are the whole plan.

0.waxing: Monday belongs to the Moon, and while it gathers light the fortnight leans towards adding — savings first, then the wishlist.
0.waning: Monday belongs to the Moon, and as its light recedes the fortnight leans towards trimming — a natural day to cut a cost, not add one.

1.waxing: Tuesday runs on Mars, which heats up money talk — with the Moon on the rise, channel that heat into asking for what is owed.
1.waning: Tuesday runs on Mars, which can rush a purchase — and in this quieter lunar stretch the smarter energy is clearing dues, not adding new ones.

2.waxing: Wednesday is Mercury's day — counting, comparing and negotiating all sharpen — and the brightening Moon favours building the plan.

3.waxing: Thursday carries Jupiter's expansive hand, and with the Moon filling out it is the classic day for the long game over the quick win.

4.waxing: Friday is Venus's day, when money wants to be enjoyed — the swelling Moon makes room for the planned treat, not the impulse one.
4.waning: Friday is Venus's day, fond of comfort purchases — under a dimming Moon, satisfaction comes cheaper: use what you already own.

5.waxing: Saturday answers to Saturn, the strict accountant — even on a brightening Moon it rewards discipline over daring.

6.waxing: Sunday belongs to the Sun — clear light for the big financial picture — and the waxing Moon supports setting the month's goal.
